sections.heading: Full text
sections.text:
Mines and Minerals Development (Amendment) [No. 9 of 2009 51
GOVERNMENT OF ZAMBIA
ACT
No. 9 of 2009
Date of Assent: 31st March, 2009
An Act to amend the Mines and Minerals Development Act.
[3rd April, 2009
ENACTED by the Parliament of Zambia.
Enactment
This Act may be cited as the Mines and Minerals
Short tale
Development (Amendment) Act, 2009, and shall be read as one
with the Mines and Minerals Development Act, 2008, in this Act Act No. 7 of
2008
referred to as the principal Act.
Section seven of the principal Act is amended by—
Amendment
of section 7
the deletion of subsection (4); and
the re-numbering of subsections (4) and (5)
respectively.
Single copies of this Act may be obtained fi rom the Government Printer
P 0. Box 30136, 10101, Lusaka. Price K1000
5 2
